name: Axsome Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Axsome Therapeutics is a biopharmaceutical company that develops and commercializes therapies for central nervous system (CNS) disorders. Its marketed products include AUVELITY, SUNOSI, and SYMBRAVO, and it has clinical development programs for product candidates such as AXS-05, AXS-07, and others.
sellsTo: Patients via prescriptions through healthcare providers and payors
Licensees such as Pharmanovia for ex-U.S. markets

exposures.sentence: Item 1. Business for a summary of our marketed products and clinical development programs.
